title: 💤 Dreamtime Protocol Stacks
name: Dreamtime Protocol Stacks
what_it_is: Layered systems that allow dreaming to be navigated like code—stacked protocols of subconscious logic, each layer altering dream physics.
how_to_use: she navigates dreamstack—hopping between layers of sleep protocol
his code rewrites REM layer 3—injecting clarity into the fog
animation_behavior: Scenes shift layer by layer, UI elements emerge mid-dream, physics flickers with each protocol shift ---
